alt: The berry homeland mobile site image
title: The Berry Homeland
text: The Berry Homeland website displays information about this agricultural business experts in the Abaca fiber manufacturing. Developed and customized E-Commerce website using Bootstrap, HTML, CSS and JS. Site deployed to github-pages.

title: JCB Real Estate Services
text: Application that allows the user to see infomation about the real estate agent, as well their journey to a realty career, and team members. Site created with React, HTML, CSS, JS, and deployed to github pages.

title: Spark Events
text: Implemented ticketmaster API to create a dynamic app where users can type in and search for events, attractions, sport events and so on.

title: Gullible
text: Allows the user to search for movie or series information. Data is gathered from the omdb API.

title: Weather Dashboard
text: Allows the user to see the weather forecast of any city, as well as the forecast for the next 5 days. Data gathered from the weather API. All weather icons were designed, customized, and animated by me.
